description: Yggdrasil address derivation test vector. Seed all-0x01, matches Rust ygg_addr_from_pubkey, C lichen_identity_ygg_addr_from_ed25519, and Python yggdrasil_address.
Zero pubkey vector verifying U/L bit clear in IID and Yggdrasil prefix.
Known vector from Yggdrasil official test suite (pubkey from Ed25519 test vector).
note: LICHEN IID = SHA-512(pubkey)[0:8] with U/L bit cleared
